report.summary: Community growth cycle v2 (Apr 1): Pectra mainnet countdown (5 days) as lead narrative for Apr 5-11 batch; drafted tweets #250-253 (Pectra 6-post thread, tax deadline 14-day countdown, omnichain DeFi, stablecoin payments); newsletter v42 (Pectra Week edition, sends Apr 10); 2 Discord/Telegram posts (Pectra countdown + Pectra day announcement); 2 social cards created (Pectra 3-EIP breakdown + Tax Guide 2026 scenario grid); posting schedule: Sat Apr 5 thread → Tue Apr 7 tax tweet → Wed Apr 8 omnichain → Thu Apr 9 stablecoin → Thu Apr 10 newsletter + Discord Pectra day.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #250 (Sat Apr 5, 12PM): Pectra Countdown Thread (6 tweets) — hook on '5 days until Ethereum's biggest upgrade since The Merge'; EIP-7702 smart accounts, EIP-7251 validator consolidation, EIP-7691 doubled blob throughput; ETH sentiment divergence angle; CTA to /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide
Tweet #251 (Tue Apr 7, 11AM): Tax Deadline Countdown — 14 days to April 15; every swap taxable, DeFi yield is income, staking double-taxed; CTA to /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026
Tweet #252 (Wed Apr 8, 2PM): Omnichain DeFi — $80B+ TVL fragmented across 200+ chains; unified liquidity as the fix; CTA to /learn/omnichain-defi-unified-liquidity-guide-2026

Tweet #253 (Thu Apr 9, 10AM): Stablecoin Payments Infrastructure — $27.6T settled in 2025 (more than Visa+Mastercard); Circle CCTP, PayFi, programmable payments; CTA to /learn/stablecoin-payments-infrastructure-guide-2026

Newsletter v42 (Thu Apr 10, 10AM): Pectra Week Edition — 3 subject lines; market pulse with sentiment divergence; Pectra breakdown (4 EIPs); stablecoin + omnichain new guides; tax countdown; Degen Corner on Merge-era ETH price parallel
Discord/Telegram (Sat Apr 5, 6PM): Pectra 5-day countdown — what's shipping, new content, market context
Discord/Telegram (Thu Apr 10, 12PM): Pectra Day announcement — live on mainnet, what changed, historical parallel

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-pectra-countdown-5days.svg — 1200x630 social card: 3 glass-morphism EIP cards (EIP-7702 Smart Accounts, EIP-7691 2x Blob Throughput, EIP-7251 2048 ETH Max Stake); amber '5 DAYS TO MAINNET' countdown badge; ETH diamond icon; market context bar (ETH $2,133, -60% from high, F&G 8, 55-day streak); brand gradient. Saved to /public/social-pectra-countdown-5days.svg

social-tax-deadline-14days.svg — 1200x630 social card: 4 taxable event cards (Token Swaps, DeFi Yield, NFT Sales, Airdrops); red-amber '14 DAYS TO APRIL 15' urgent badge; SEC 2026 clarification highlight (green); CTA bar; 2x2 scenario grid layout. Saved to /public/social-tax-deadline-14days.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Site has 606 published pages (+23 from Mar 29). 1,237 page.tsx files on disk. 2 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE (stablecoin payments + omnichain DeFi) — social content pre-drafted and ready to promote on publish day.

CRITICAL: 452 uncommitted files, Day 7 without deploy. All new content, social cards, and metadata fixes are invisible to Google and users until deploy. This is the single biggest blocker to community growth effectiveness.
Market: BTC $68,688 (+1.94%), ETH $2,133 (+3.75%), SOL $83.86 (+1.08%), F&G 8 (Extreme Fear, 55+ day streak). Price-sentiment divergence is the core narrative for Q2 opener content.
Pectra mainnet April 10 creates a natural 5-day countdown narrative — perfectly timed for a Twitter thread with daily urgency. This is the highest-impact content angle available this week.
Tax deadline April 15 creates 14-day urgency window — search intent for 'crypto tax 2026' is at or near peak. Social content timed to capture this.
Two queued guides (stablecoin payments, omnichain DeFi) have social content pre-drafted — tweets #252 and #253 ready to publish as soon as pages are promoted from queue.
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-04-01-social-drafts-v2.md
Social cards saved to /public/social-pectra-countdown-5days.svg and /public/social-tax-deadline-14days.svg
Posting schedule: Sat Apr 5 Pectra thread + Discord → Tue Apr 7 tax tweet → Wed Apr 8 omnichain tweet → Thu Apr 9 stablecoin tweet → Thu Apr 10 newsletter + Pectra day Discord

sections.title: Key Narratives Leveraged
items: Pectra mainnet countdown (5 days): EIP-7702 smart accounts as transformative UX upgrade; biggest change since The Merge; ETH sentiment divergence angle (biggest upgrade in 2 years, lowest sentiment in 2 years).
Tax deadline urgency (14 days): Every DeFi scenario covered; SEC token taxonomy clarification creates new certainty around airdrop/staking tax treatment; daily urgency amplifies through April 15.
Stablecoin infrastructure: $27.6T settled in 2025 exceeding Visa+Mastercard — stablecoins as rails, not just trading pairs. Timely with GENIUS Act and Circle CCTP expansion.
Omnichain DeFi: $80B+ TVL fragmented across 200+ chains — unified liquidity as the next DeFi evolution. Bridges chain abstraction narrative to practical DeFi use case.
Historical pattern (Degen Corner): The Merge shipped at ETH $1,600 (Sep 2022), ETH hit $4,800 within 24 months. Pectra shipping at ETH $2,100. Not prediction — pattern.
